items.claim: Tabitha Richi is explosive and possesses power, elbows, and knees.
items.quote: She's explosive, has power, can throw elbows and knees.

items.claim: Tabitha Richi performed well against Amanda Ribas, specifically hurting her with an elbow.
items.quote: I really liked how she performed against Amanda Reeboss. I believe she actually like hurt Amanda Reebos bad to the face with a nasty elbow.

items.claim: Klein's only loss was to Jasmine Jasudavicius while competing up a weight class.
items.quote: Klein's only lost to Jasmine Jasticious. No shame in that. That was up a weight class.

items.claim: Chase Hooper missed weight for his upcoming fight.
items.quote: Chase Hooper missed weight as well.

items.claim: Chase Hooper lacks durability and grit.
items.quote: No durability. Takedown or boss fighter. No grit.
We've seen Chase Hooper. He does not like to get hit.

items.claim: Mitch Ramirez has more power and finishing threat on the feet than Chase Hooper.
items.quote: Mitch Ramirez actually, I would say, has more power than Chase Hooper and finishing threat on the feet.

items.claim: Christian Leroy Duncan's defensive wrestling needs improvement.
items.quote: CLLD's wrestling defensively needs some work.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis can be controlled and often shoots poor takedowns that lead to him being reversed.
items.quote: The issue with DDP is he can be controlled or end up shooting goofy takedowns and getting reversed.

items.claim: Dricus Du Plessis was taken down by Darren Till.
items.quote: DDP did get taken down by Darren Till.
